use_cases: Display real-time application logs in dev tools dashboards
Monitor system health and events in operational monitoring interfaces
Show activity feeds in developer-focused SaaS applications
Serve as a debug console visualization for web applications
Provide server event monitoring for backend service dashboards
ai_summary: A real-time log stream component that displays scrolling log entries with timestamps, severity levels (INFO, SUCCESS, WARNING, ERROR), and color-coded icons. Built with Framer Motion for smooth entrance animations, it automatically generates new log entries every 1.5 seconds and maintains a scrolling feed of up to 20 entries with monospace styling. Ideal for dev tools, monitoring dashboards, and SaaS applications requiring live event visibility.
